ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/json
var callStart = vars.callStartTime default now() var durationMs = (now() - callStart) as Number {unit: "milliseconds"} default 0 --- { level: if (vars.callStatus default "SUCCESS" == "SUCCESS") "INFO" else "ERROR", logType: "EXTERNAL_CALL", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, applicationName: app.name, environment: Mule::p('mule.env') default "local", spanId: vars.spanId default uuid(), externalCall: { system: vars.externalSystem default "unknown", operation: vars.externalOperation default "unknown", durationMs: durationMs, status: vars.callStatus default "SUCCESS", endpoint: vars.externalEndpoint default "unknown", responseCode: vars.externalResponseCode default null } }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { level: "INFO", logType: "BUSINESS_EVENT", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, applicationName: app.name, environment: Mule::p('mule.env') default "local", spanId: vars.spanId default uuid(), businessEvent: { eventType: vars.eventType default "UNKNOWN", entityType: vars.entityType default "UNKNOWN", entityId: vars.entityId default "UNKNOWN", details: vars.eventDetails default {}, userId: vars.userId default "system", source: vars.eventSource default app.name } }
